name: Niyu

note.title: Morning note
note.body:
Good morning Niyu!

Hope you slept well. Quick reminder from last night - be ready with that high protein mousse today, I've been thinking about it since I sent you that reel.

Can't wait to try it.

— your favorite taste tester

jarHint: Shake the jar for your morning note
roomTitle: A little room made for your mornings

weatherMessages.rain: It's a rainy day. Carry your umbrella with you okay
weatherMessages.thunderstorm: There's thunder about today, stay cozy and take it slow
weatherMessages.hot: It's going to be quite hot today. Please don't skip water just because you're busy
weatherMessages.sunny: Bright and sunny out there. Perfect day to step outside for a bit
weatherMessages.cloudy: Soft cloudy skies today, a gentle kind of morning
weatherMessages.cold: It's a little cold today, wear something warm before you head out
weatherMessages.night: It's quiet and dark outside. Sleep well when you get there
weatherMessages.fog: It's foggy out there this morning, drive a little slower than usual
